name: IntQueue

code:
struct IntQueue(Copyable, Movable):
    var data: List[Int]
    var head: Int

    def __init__(out self):
        self.data = List[]
        self.head = 0

    def enqueue(mut self, x: Int):
        self.data.append(x)

    def dequeue(mut self) -> Int:
        var v = self.data[self.head]
        _ = self.head += 1
        return v

    def count(self) -> Int:
        return len(self.data) - self.head

name: Matrix2x2
code:
struct Matrix2x2(Copyable, Movable):
    var a: Float64
    var b: Float64
    var c: Float64
    var d: Float64

    def __init__(out self, a_: Float64, b_: Float64, c_: Float64, d_: Float64):
        self.a = a_
        self.b = b_
        self.c = c_
        self.d = d_

    def determinant(self) -> Float64:
        return self.a * self.d - self.b * self.c

    def trace(self) -> Float64:
        return self.a + self.d

    def multiply(self, o: Matrix2x2) -> Matrix2x2:
        return Matrix2x2(self.a * o.a + self.b * o.c, self.a * o.b + self.b * o.d,
                          self.c * o.a + self.d * o.c, self.c * o.b + self.d * o.d)

code:
struct Quadratic(Copyable, Movable):
    var a: Float64
    var b: Float64
    var c: Float64

def evaluate(q: Quadratic, x: Float64) -> Float64:
    return q.a * x * x + q.b * x + q.c

def discriminant(q: Quadratic) -> Float64:
    return q.b * q.b - 4.0 * q.a * q.c

code:
def clz64(n: Int) -> Int:
    var c = 0
    var mask = 1 << 63
    var current_mask = mask
    while current_mask & n == 0:
        c += 1
        current_mask >>= 1
    return c

name: horner_poly
code:
def horner_poly(x: Float64) -> Float64:
    var c = List[Float64]()
    c.append(2.0)
    c.append(-3.0)
    c.append(0.5)
    c.append(1.0)
    c.append(-1.0)
    var r = 0.0
    for i in range(5):
        r = r * x + c[i]
    return r

def parity(n: UInt64) -> Int:
    var p = 0
    var x = n
    while x != 0:
        p ^= Int(x & 1)
        x >>= 1
    return p

def popcount(n: Int) -> Int:
    var x = n
    var c = 0
    while x != 0:

        x >>= 1
    return c
